name: Phase 3 Command Bar AI Test
description: Verify that the command bar can trigger the AI parser and open the EventDialog

planSteps.description: Enter 'demo@timeora.app' into the email input field and 'TimeoraDemo123!' into the password input field
Wait for 3 seconds for the dashboard to load
Click on the input placeholder containing 'Jadwalkan sesuatu dengan AI'
Type 'Lunch break tomorrow at 12pm for 60 minutes' into the Command Bar input field
Wait for 5 seconds for the AI to parse the request
Verify that the Event Dialog is visible and the Title input field contains 'Lunch break' or similar
